ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that it has not received courtesy copies of the pleadings that were filed after the September 18th hearing. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on January 8, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why he has not complied with the local rules regarding delivery of courtesy copies. The First and Final Account and Report on Status of Administration, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Continued To Dec-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Continued To Oct-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: June Lee for Alvin Louie and Terry Louie (Petitioners).

The Court noted that there is no response to the Probate Examiner's notes. Ms. Lee stated that she prepared a supplement addressing the notes, that originally there were three petitioners, that one is now independently represented by separate Counsel and requested a continuance stating that she has forwarded the notes to Counsel. The First and Final Account and Report on Status of Administration, etc. is continued to October 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Continued To May-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: June Lee for Alvin and Terry Louie (Petitioners) via Court Call.

Ms. Lee stated that her 1st and Final Account was reject on e-filing for a minor detail, it is being corrected and will be e-filed today. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to May 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Continued To Apr-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alan Silver appeared by telephone for Alvin Louie, Terry Louie and Steven Kaye.

Mr. Silver stated that litigation with one of the Co-Executors is still ongoing, that the estate is unable to close and that he can file a petition for approval of report on status of administration within 30-days. Status on close of estate is continued to April 23, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Continued To Mar-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Co-Executors to appear on March 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain the status on close of estate. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Jung. (Not Reported)
